characters.name: Akiko Hayawa
characters.description: AkikoHayakawa(早川 秋子Hayakawa Akiko)is one of the five main protagonists ofSweet Home. She is a nurse on a team of reporters making a documentary aboutIchirō Mamiya. Her signature item isMedical Kit(+Kit) (replaceable by thePills) which can be used to healstatus ailmentsfrom any afflicted party member. Even though she is the weakest character, she is an invaluable asset, as status ailments can be deadly if left untreated. She has a Max HP of 2270, the same asAsukaandEmi.

characters.name: Akiko Hayawa

characters.name: Asuka
characters.description: Asuka (アスカAsuka) is one of the five main protagonists ofSweet Home. She is an art restorer on a team of reporters making a documentary onIchirō Mamiya. Her signature item is theVacuum(replaceable by theBroom) which can be used to clear debris off of the floor (which would otherwise be impassable) or to clear dust off of frescoes so thatTarocan properly photograph them. She is the second weakest character of the five, just aboveAkiko, and has a Max HP of 2270, the same asAkikoandEmi.

characters.name: Emi
characters.description: EmiJapanese nameえみGameplayHP value2270Special itemKeyWire Script error: No such module "Hatnote". Emi(えみ?)is one of the five protagonists ofSweet Home. Her signature item is theKey(replaceable by theWire) which unlocks most of the locked doors in themansion. She is the strongest of the 3 female characters, making her the 3rd strongest overall. She is also the youngest fastest of the crew and has a Max HP of 2270, the same asAkikoandAsuka. She is the daughter ofKazuoandMrs. Hishino.↵

characters.name: Emi Hoshino
characters.description: EmiFilmPortrayed byNokko Script error: No such module "Hatnote". Emi Hoshino(星野 エミ,Hoshino Emi?)is the daughter ofKazuo HoshinoandMrs. Hishino. Still a high school student, she joins her father's documentary work in the Summer to investigate Mamiya Mansion. While there she is captured by Lady Mamiya, but is rescued by film producerAkiko Hayakawa.

characters.name: Ichirō Mamiya
characters.description: A Projector's Image of Ichirō IchirōMamiya(間宮 一郎Mamiya Ichirō) was a famous painter who disappeared in hismansion30 years prior to the events ofSweet Home. His disappearance is believed to be connected to hiswife'ssuicide. He painted 24 frescoes throughout his home, which can be photographed byTaroto reveal hints and bits of backstory. The five protagonists visit his mansion to make a documentary about his life and works.

characters.name: Ichirō Mamiya
characters.description: A Projector's Image of Ichirō IchirōMamiya(間宮 一郎Mamiya Ichirō) was a famous painter who disappeared in hismansion30 years prior to the events ofSweet Home. The five protagonists visit his mansion to make a documentary about his life and works.

characters.name: Kazuo Hoshino
characters.description: Kazuo Hoshino(星野 和夫Hoshino Kazuo)is the one of the five main protagonists ofSweet Home. He is the director of a team of reporters making a documentary aboutIchirō Mamiya. His signature item is theLighter(replaceable by theMatches) which can be used to burn ropes that block the way, or lightning candles to make dark rooms visible. It also does bonus damage toWormsandSkull. He is the strongest character, and has the highest Max HP at 2320. He isEmi’s father andMrs. Hoshino's husband.

characters.name: Kazuo Hoshino
characters.description: Kazuo Hoshino(星野 和夫Hoshino Kazuo)is the one of the five main protagonists ofSweet Home. He is the director of a team of reporters making a documentary aboutIchirō Mamiya. His signature item is theLighter(replaceable by theMatches) which can be used to burn ropes that block the way, or lightning candles to make dark rooms visible. It also does bonus damage toWormsandSkull. He is the strongest character, and has the highest Max HP at 2320. He isEmi’s father andMrs. Hoshino's husband.

characters.name: Lady Mamiya
characters.description: Phase 1 Lady Mamiya(間宮夫人Mamiya Fujin)is the main antagonist and final boss ofSweet Home. When the crew first arrive at themansion, the ghost of Lady Mamiya appears before them and seals off the exit. Lady Mamiya was the beloved wife ofIchirō Mamiya. In 1959, thirty years prior to the events of the game, her two-year-old son accidentally fell into a furnace. Distraught by her loss, she began to go insane, kidnapping other children and throwing them into the furnace so that her son could have "playmates". After being caught red-handed by local villagers, she committed suicide in the same furnace. Her furious spirit now haunts Mamiya Mansion, attempting to either kill or drive off anyone who goes near her son's grave.

characters.name: Lady Mamiya

When the crew first arrive at themansion, the ghost of Lady Mamiya appears before them and seals off the exit. Lady Mamiya was the beloved wife ofIchirō Mamiya. In 1959, thirty years prior to the events of the game, her two-year-old son accidentally fell into a furnace. Distraught by her loss, she began to go insane, kidnapping other children and throwing them into the furnace so that her son could have "playmates". After being caught red-handed by local villagers, she committed suicide in the same furnace. Her furious spirit now haunts Mamiya Mansion, attempting to either kill or drive off anyone who goes near her son's grave.

characters.name: Taguchi
characters.description: TaguchiJapanese nameたぐち Script error: No such module "Hatnote". Taguchiis one of the five main protagonists ofSweet Home. He is a cameraman on a team of reporters making a documentary aboutIchirō Mamiya. His signature item is theCamera(replaceable by a differentCamera) which can be used to take photographs of the many frescoes throughout themansion. Taking a photo of a fresco will reveal either a hint on how to proceed, or some backstory to the events that unfolded prior to when the game takes place. It also does bonus damage toBats,Wraith, andGhost. He has the highest defense out of the party, as well as the second highest Max HP at 2290.

characters.name: Taguchi Ryō
characters.description: Taguchi RyōJapanese name田口 亮 Script error: No such module "Hatnote". Taguchi Ryō(田口 亮,Taguchi Ryō?)is one of the five main protagonists ofSweet Home. He is a cameraman on a team of reporters making a documentary aboutIchirō Mamiya. He was killed byLady Mamiya.

characters.name: Yamamura
characters.description: Overworld Yamamurais a mysterious old man who aids the crew later in the game. He explains that the reasonLady Mamiyais restless is because her son's grave has been defiled. He is also exceptionally strong, pushing large statues and breaking through walls. He ultimately sacrifices himself by trying to bypass one of Lady Mamiya's barriers, which was strong enough to melt his flesh off and reduce him to a skeleton (with the film having his skeleton collapse into a heap shortly thereafter).
